sentence: 海南的旅游业每年都在增长。
pinyin: Hǎinán de lǚyóuyè měi nián dōu zài zēngzhǎng.
english: Hainan's tourism industry grows every year.

sentence: 这个地区矿产资源非常丰富。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū kuàngchǎn zīyuán fēicháng fēngfù.
english: This region is very rich in mineral resources.

meaning: be lost in thought; entranced; preoccupation; Trance (music genre)
sentence: 她盯着窗外出神，没听见我说话。
pinyin: Tā dīngzhe chuāng wài chūshén, méi tīngjiàn wǒ shuōhuà.
english: She stared out the window lost in thought and didn't hear me.

sentence: 鸟类是由恐龙演化而来的。
pinyin: Niǎolèi shì yóu kǒnglóng yǎnhuà ér lái de.

sentence: 他在大学里学的是光学专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué lǐ xué de shì guāngxué zhuānyè.
english: He majored in optics at university.
